description.tr: Channel crossing and United Kingdom integration for France-origin loads into the Turkey corridor with Hanbros UK.
description.en: Channel crossing and United Kingdom integration for France-origin loads into the Turkey corridor with Hanbros UK.

keyword.tr: Calais Dover short sea, Le Havre RoRo UK integration, out-of-gauge France origin load
keyword.en: Calais Dover short sea, Le Havre RoRo UK integration, out-of-gauge France origin load

text.tr:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Out-of-gauge moves need permits planned separately.
text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Out-of-gauge moves need permits planned separately.
